demographics.living_situation: lives at home with a spouse/housemate

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I passed out for a few seconds in my kitchen this afternoon, and my boss says I can't drive the fuel truck tomorrow unless a doctor clears me tonight.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: He fainted briefly earlier today and needs a doctor to say whether he is medically able to drive his commercial truck in the morning; his employer is on the phone and wants clearance tonight.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 6 hours ago, this afternoon, while standing at the kitchen sink
symptom_narrative.duration: the blackout lasted around 10 seconds; he came round on his own straight away
symptom_narrative.character: felt suddenly lightheaded with tunnel vision, then blacked out for a few seconds and came to on his own
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: frightening in the moment but he feels completely back to normal now
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: happened in the kitchen; no injury from a fall
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: a single episode, has not happened again since
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: recovered fully and spontaneously within seconds
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: nothing he noticed; it came out of the blue with no clear trigger
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: denies any chest pain, palpitations or shortness of breath before or after; no tongue biting, no wetting himself, no confusion afterwards
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: says nothing like this has ever happened to him before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: currently feels fully himself and is worried mainly about losing his job if he cannot drive tomorrow

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: high blood pressure that he manages with diet, no tablets

social_history_volunteered.alcohol: denies any alcohol or substance use problem
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: drives a commercial heavy vehicle carrying hazardous materials/fuel; scheduled to start a shift at 6am tomorrow; very anxious about losing income if he cannot work

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: primarily wants to be cleared to drive tomorrow so he does not lose his shift and income; may minimise the event to obtain clearance

communication_style.typical_message_style: practical, focused on the work deadline and the employer waiting on the line

access_barriers.financial: immediate loss of income if suspended from driving

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported from memory, not measured this encounter

objective_data_offered.value: on video he looks well, alert and comfortable, talking in full sentences with no obvious distress
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: video impression only; not a substitute for a hands-on cardiovascular or neurological examination
